reviews.comment:
ACÁ DOLORES YPF
Me encanta, siempre limpio ordenado, muy buena atención, baños públicos limpios y espacioso, muchos juegos para entretener a los más chicos al aire libre o en el interior hay un centro de recreación para niños. Podes tomar mates y descansar del viaje afuera en sus mesas o tomate un café adentro. Me parece espaciosa

(Translated by Google)
HERE DOLORES YPF
I love it. It's always clean and tidy, with excellent service, clean and spacious public restrooms, and lots of outdoor games to entertain the little ones. There's also a children's recreation center inside. You can have mate and rest from the trip outside at the tables, or have a coffee inside. I think it's spacious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBOTZSWRAB
